scripts.dev: concurrently -n bridge,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:bridge" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix ocaml-quant-dashboard/bridge && npm run lint --prefix ocaml-quant-dashboard/frontend
scripts.check: dune build && npm run lint && npm run build:bridge && npm run build:frontend
scripts.postinstall: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:bridge
